security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'; form-action 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1421; font-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-src 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: Download public video and audio with local-first fallbacks.
bundle.longDescription: rsdownit is a free, open-source desktop downloader for public media links. It uses a local engine first and optional user-approved fallbacks when a site needs another extraction method.
